title: feat(image): add seed support for Nova Reel
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Planting seeds in Nova Reel
gist.blurb: Nova Reel video generation now supports the seed parameter! Plant a specific number to recreate that perfect generation, or let it grow wild with a random seed.
gist.summary: Added seed parameter support to the Nova Reel video generation model and updated the API documentation to reflect supported video parameters.
gist.impact: Creators can now generate reproducible videos with Nova Reel by passing a specific seed value, making iterative prompting and tweaking much easier.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee planting a glowing digital seed into a chunky retro film reel. The monitor robot companion holding a clapperboard with 'SEED 42' on it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot planting a glowing digital seed into a chunky retro film reel. A cute robot with a CRT monitor head holds a movie clapperboard reading 'SEED 42'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot planting a glowing digital seed into a chunky retro film reel. A cute robot with a CRT monitor head holds a movie clapperboard reading 'SEED 42'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, nostalgic but beautiful.
